nodes.label: AI as collaborative problem-solving partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as independent task executor without collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to collaborate with the AI model throughout the problem-solving process

nodes.label: AI for holistic thinking and abstraction
nodes.grounding_span: it has allowed me to abstract certain coding challenges further

nodes.label: AI reliability and need for human vetting
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous and trustworthy
nodes.grounding_span: the solution these AI models provide are far from perfect

nodes.label: AI as junior assistant for admin tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human role

nodes.label: Proper AI use with fact-checking
nodes.grounding_span: my biggest concern here is for them to use these tools properly by fact-checking all claims

nodes.label: Professional competence and quality
nodes.grounding_span: fact-checking all claims and code it provides before pushing this code into production

nodes.label: Strategic focus and broader perspective
nodes.grounding_span: push my focus on a much more broader perspective in my role

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: help me deal with admin tasks in my day to day job much more quickly

nodes.label: Frustration when AI fails to follow intended direction
nodes.grounding_span: I know I feel frustrated using AI tools when I attempt to prompt the AI models to think in a certain way ... but the model does not go anywhere with it

nodes.label: Positive outlook on AI enabling holistic thinking
nodes.grounding_span: it has allowed me to abstract certain coding challenges further

nodes.label: Concern about colleagues' uncritical AI use
nodes.grounding_span: my biggest concern here is for them to use these tools properly by fact-checking all claims

nodes.label: Optimistic vision of AI as junior assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I envision my relationship with AI to be almost like working with a junior assistant

nodes.label: Iterative context refinement — provides initial context then adds more to refine
nodes.grounding_span: providing as much initial context as possible in my initial prompt, and then sprinkle in further context to refine potential solutions further

nodes.label: Metacognitive reflection on prompting — attributes failures to own prompting rather than AI
nodes.grounding_span: I believe it is always a human problem, when I reach these stages I usually try and cool off and find a different approach
